care.summary: Dark glossy leaves and white spathes; signals thirst with dramatic droop then recovers.
care.light: Low to medium indirect; avoid harsh sun
care.water: When top inch dries; keep evenly moist not soggy
care.fertilizer: Monthly dilute feed in growing season
common_issues: Brown tips from dry air or fluoride
No blooms in too little light
tips: Group with other plants for humidity
